name: Saigon's Restaurant
tagline: Honest Southern Vietnamese cooking on Waialae — the yellow curry wins people over and the pho is among the better bowls on the island.
mustOrder: vermicelli bowl — a solid everyday lunch
talkStory: A neighborhood Vietnamese restaurant that's been on Waialae Ave for years, serving the Kaimuki/Kahala local crowd. Southern Vietnamese style — pho, banh mi, vermicelli, rice plates. Not fancy, not trendy, just well-executed Vietnamese food at reasonable prices. The Pig and The Lady covers Vietnamese-fusion; Saigon's is the traditional, affordable everyday counterpart. Lunch and dinner, closed Mondays.
